name: Appetizer Cheesecake#1
recipeIngredient: 1 Large stalk celery, cut into pieces (1 inch)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the bottom and sides of a spring-form pan with melted butter or margarine.
2. Put one-third of the cheese crackers in a blender; cover and run on low speed until crumbled. Pour crumbs into a bowl and repeat until all crackers are crumbled. Cover half of the cracker crumbs on the bottom of the pan. Reserve the remaining crumbs for topping.
3. In a blender, combine sour cream, green olives, green pepper, onion, lemon juice, salt, Worcestershire sauce, paprika, Tabasco, and celery. Cover and run on low speed until smooth.
4. Spread the mixture over the cracker crumb base.
5. Scatter the remaining cracker crumbs evenly on top.
6. Cover with wax paper and refrigerate for 24 hours.
7. Remove the sides of the pan; place the cake (still on the pan bottom) on a serving dish.
8. Garnish with pitted ripe olives and pimento strips.
9. Serve with pumpernickel or crisp rye crackers. Serves 12.
